items.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
items.summary: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

items.title: Tether leads Belo's $14 million raise to expand stablecoin payments across Latin America
items.summary: Belo, which has over 3 million users across Latin America, offers a digital wallet that lets users hold and transfer local currencies alongside digital dollars.

items.title: Dunamu, Hana Financial take blockchain remittance system live with POSCO
items.summary: South Korea's Hana Financial, POSCO International and Upbit operator Dunamu have moved their blockchain remittance system into live trade transactions.

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds from key support as traders eye renewed push toward $80,000
items.summary: BTC climbs after holding at the $75,600 support level while derivatives signal de-risking, and speculative flows build in memecoins ahead of tech earnings.

items.title: Polymarket pushes for broader US relaunch with CFTC talks: Report
items.summary: Polymarket is reportedly in talks with the CFTC to restore US access after its 2022 settlement, following a limited US rollout in December 2025 focused on sports contracts.

items.title: Mezo unveils institutional bitcoin yield vaults as demand grows to put idle BTC to work
items.summary: A new product from Mezo, backed by Anchorage Digital and seeded by Bullish, highlights a broader shift as institutions seek yield on bitcoin without sacrificing custody or control.

items.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky settles FTC case with $10M payment
items.summary: The FTC order ties Mashinsky’s $10 million payment to a mostly suspended $4.72 billion judgment that can be revived over asset disclosures.

items.title: Fake Hong Kong stablecoins start trading as real ones remain absent

items.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial

items.title: Canada proposes crypto ATM ban over scams and money laundering

items.title: KuCoin EU hires anti-money laundering talent to appease Austrian regulator
items.summary: KuCoin was ordered by Austria’s FMA to halt business in the EU because of a shortfall in AML and compliance staff.

items.title: Bitcoin, stocks risk 'months' of losses as Kevin Warsh Becomes Fed chair

items.title: Pump.fun has been using all its revenue to burn its token. Now it’s changing course
